name: Pre-existing back pain flared up bad after construction lift accident in Boise—can I still claim?
description: Yes for aggravation; medical proof required.

mainEntity.name: Pre-existing back pain flared up bad after construction lift accident in Boise—can I still claim?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes for aggravation; medical proof required.
acceptedAnswer.description: **Yes, if the accident aggravated it; workers' comp covers aggravations, third-party for negligence.** Prove causation via medical opinion[2]. **Key factors:** 1. Aggravation not excluded. 2. Fault irrelevant for comp. 3. Comparative for suits. 4. Full records essential. Get specialist eval. Lawyer fights insurer denials on pre-existing issues.
